report.summary: UX audit of 8 newly published pages; fixed accessibility font sizes on 3 pages (yield-bearing-stablecoins, chain-abstraction, gpu-compute), added BackToTop to chain-abstraction, increased tab touch targets to 44px+ on 2 pages.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added BackToTop component to /learn/chain-abstraction (was missing — import + render)
Increased tab button padding from 12px to 14px on /learn/yield-bearing-stablecoins and /learn/chain-abstraction (touch target compliance: 44px+ height)
Bumped all fontSize: 13 → 14 across 3 pages (yield-bearing-stablecoins, chain-abstraction, gpu-compute) for WCAG body text minimum
Bumped all fontSize: 12 → 13 for stat labels, badges, and tag text across all 3 pages
Fixed fontSize: 11 → 13 on 4 code block examples in /learn/chain-abstraction (were severely undersized)

sections.title: UX Audit Findings (No Action Needed)
items: Crypto Payroll Guide 2026: proper server component with Metadata, OG images, Breadcrumb, BackToTop, StructuredData
Solana ETF Guide 2026: proper server component with full SEO setup and accessibility compliance
DeFi Insurance Guide 2026: clean layout, proper structured data, OG images configured
Fluid Protocol Guide: well-structured with FAQ schema and article schema
Karak Network Guide: proper metadata, OG images, structured data

sections.title: OG Image Status
items: 5 server-component pages have properly configured OG images via /api/og endpoint (crypto-payroll, solana-etf, defi-insurance, fluid-protocol, karak-network)
GPU compute guide: OG images configured correctly in Metadata export

2 client-component pages (yield-bearing-stablecoins, chain-abstraction) lack server-side OG metadata — architectural limitation of 'use client' pages; noted for future refactor to split into server wrapper + client component

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: /learn/crypto-payroll-guide-2026 (pass)
/learn/solana-etf-guide-2026 (pass)
/learn/yield-bearing-stablecoins (fixed: font sizes, tab touch targets)
/learn/defi-insurance-guide-2026 (pass)
/learn/decentralized-gpu-compute-networks-guide (fixed: font sizes)
/learn/fluid-protocol-guide (pass)
/learn/karak-network-guide (pass)
